message: There is no sign of Ash inside the bar. This has happened before, but
A middle-aged man employed by Ash
The flow of customers seems normal.
He looks to be in his mid-30s, and even without his employer Ash around, he’s not slacking off.
Since he's handling orders alone, he looks quite busy. He probably doesn't have time for me.
He seems like a nice guy, but
he wouldn’t be someone to chat with.
Today, the master is taking a day off.
I’m sorry, I can't really be much of a conversation partner.
Guy from Nets has died. I was a fan, so I'm very sad.
Do you think he might stop by here even for a moment?
I don't think that will happen today.
It seemed like he suddenly had some research to do, and he was bustling about since yesterday.
I wonder what on earth happened.
Since we’ve known each other for a long time, I wish you’d be there properly at times like this and offer some comforting words.
Even if things are hectic, I can’t help but wonder what really happened.
He really is a mysterious man.
He’s quite a complex guy, more than you’d think.
I can only hope he returns soon.
